title: Upgraded Netherite
description: Adds upgraded versions of Netherite with helpful effects.
body:
Please use the Modrinth download and do not rehost the files. This mod may be used in any modpacks. (On Modrinth) No plan for fabric version at this time, sorry.

DESCRIPTION


Adds upgraded versions of netherite armor, horse armor, weapons and tools with unique effects. The armor effect can be set to require between 1 and 4 pieces. (Default: 4)

CRAFTS


Show Crafts
1.19

EFFECTS


Golderite

Armor : Piglin become neutral & Increase Luck by 2. Horse Armor : Increase rider looting by 1. Sword & Axe & Bow & CrossBow : Increase damage dealt to Piglin Brute by 10% & Increase Looting Level by 1. Looting III(or more) increase Looting Level by 1. Axe : Increase damage dealt to Piglin Brute by 10% & Increase Fortune Level by 1. Fortune III(or more) increase Fortune Level by 1. Pickaxe & Shovel : Increase Fortune Level by 1. Fortune III(or more) increase Fortune Level by 1.
Blazerite

Armor & Horse Armor : Fire damage immune and increase movement speed in lava. Sword & Axe : Increase damage dealt to targets on fire by 4%. Fire Aspect II(or more) increase damage bonus dealt by 3% & Auto-Smelting. Bow & CrossBow : Increase damage dealt to targets on fire by 4%. Flame increase damage bonus dealt by 3% & Auto-Smelting. Pickaxe & Shovel : Auto-smelting. (Can be affected by Fortune in config) Auto-smelt can be disabled/enabled with sneak + right click.
Enderite

Armor : Saves from the void(by teleporting the Player) & Prevent Enderman Anger. Horse Armor Effect : Saves from the void(by teleporting the Horse, but if you ride it without the effect of the Enderite Armor you won't be teleported with it !). Sword & Axe : Prevent teleporting for 10s & increase damage dealt to Enderman by 4% & Teleport Loot to target chest. Bow & CrossBow & Pickaxe & Shovel : Teleport Loot to target chest. Teleport loot can be disabled/enabled with sneak + right click.
Prismarite

Armor & Horse Armor : Water Breathing & Increase Movement speed in water. Sword & Axe & Bow & CrossBow : Increase damage dealt to targets immune to fire by 10% & Increase damage dealt to enderman by 10% & Increase Mining Speed underwater. Pickaxe & Shovel : Increase Mining Speed underwater.
Witherite

Armor & Horse Armor : Wither effect immune. Sword & Axe & Bow & CrossBow : Apply Wither on hit & increase damage dealt to targets affected by wither effect by 4%.
Spiderite

Armor & Horse Armor : Poison effect immune & Climbs Walls. Sword & Axe & Bow & CrossBow : Apply Poison on hit & increase damage dealt to targets affected by poison effect by 4%.
Phanterite

Armor : Fall damage immune & Increase step height. Horse Armor : Fall damage immune. Sword & Axe & Bow & CrossBow : Detect enemies & Increase damage dealt to phantom by 10% & Increase Reach by 2. Pickaxe & Shovel : Detect enemies & Increase Reach by 2. Detect enemies can be disabled/enabled with sneak + right click.
Featherite

Armor & Horse Armor : Reduce fall damage & Water/Lava Walking. Armor : Multi Jump. Sword & Bow & Tool : Attracts items near you. Bow : Apply Attraction effect.(Attract nearby Living Entity.) Attracts items can be disabled/enabled with sneak + right click.
Corrupterite

Consumes Saturation and Food for recover durability. Armor : Reduce Health by 10%. Weapon & Tool : Increase Looting, Fortune and Damage for every armor weared.
Echorite (1.19)

Soulbound. Armor : Your items have a 50% chance of remaining in your inventory when you die & Reduces Damage of Warden's Sonic Boom by 50% & Heals when in Deep Dark.. Weapon : Increased Damage dealt to Warden by 20% & Gains Experience bonus by killing Living Entities. Tool : Gains Experience bonus by mining Ore.

CONFIGURATION


Client upgradednetherite-client.toml is located in /config. Server upgradednetherite-server.toml is located in /saves/WORLD_NAME/serverconfigs. By copying this file to your /defaultconfigs folder, you can apply these configurations to all newly created worlds. Dedicated servers have this file in /world/serverconfigs

Upgraded Netherite : Items
Adds some items like apples and totems to the Upgraded Netherite mod.
Upgraded Netherite : Ultimerite
Adds Ultimerite Tier to the Upgraded Netherite mod.
Upgraded Tools
Add hammers that act as swords, axes, picks, shovels and hoes combined.
